creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
In the projects/clang390-import branch, we have imported the 3.9.0 release versions of llvm, clang, lldb and libc++.  I would like to request an exp-run using this branch, to find regressions before we merge it back to head.

For executing the run, please use:

svn://svn.freebsd.org/base/projects/clang390-import

As of r305302, the branch has been synchronized to head r305300.
